displayDescription.zh: Hopfield 网络把神经计算与物理学连接起来。一个模式可以作为能量地形中的吸引子被存储，带噪输入则会收敛回最接近的记忆。它把联想记忆、优化和神经动力学放进同一个概念框架。
displayDescription.en: Hopfield networks connected neural computation with physics. A pattern could be stored as an attractor in an energy landscape, and a noisy input could settle back into the closest memory. This made associative memory, optimization, and neural dynamics part of the same conceptual frame.

description.en: Primary source for recurrent associative memory; local images redraw energy and attractor dynamics.
description.zh: 递归联想记忆的原始来源；本地图重画能量与吸引子动力学。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

html.zh: 在深度学习之前，研究者已经在追问大量简单单元如何集体计算。Hopfield 给这个问题提供了基于能量的表述。
html.en: Before deep learning, researchers were already asking how large sets of simple units could compute collectively. Hopfield gave this question an energy-based formulation.

html.zh: 网络更新单元以降低能量函数，因此被存储的记忆会成为稳定吸引子。 关键机制是吸引子动力学与能量最小化，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。
html.en: The network updates units to reduce an energy function, so stored memories become stable attractors. The key mechanism is Attractor dynamics and energy minimization, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Hopfield 网络视为基于能量的神经计算史中的核心成果。它的长期影响在于连接了记忆、优化、吸引子动力学和统计物理。
html.en: Experts generally treat Hopfield networks as central to the history of energy-based neural computation. Their long-term legacy is the connection between memory, optimization, attractor dynamics, and statistical physics.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
